name: root_cause_analysis
description: Structure a root cause analysis using 5-whys or fishbone (Ishikawa) method. The calling agent reasons about the causes; this skill enforces the structure and generates a Mermaid diagram alongside the formatted analysis report (BABOK KA4.1).

problem_statement.description: The problem or effect being analysed.

method.description: '5_whys': chain from problem to root cause. 'fishbone': causes grouped by category.

why_chain.description: For method='5_whys': ordered chain. Each entry: {why: str, because: str}.

causes.description: For method='fishbone': dict mapping category names (People/Process/Technology/Environment/Materials/Measurement) to lists of cause strings.

root_causes.description: Identified root causes (bottom of 5-whys chain or tips of fishbone).
